Cravelle Training

Professional development courses designed to complement our internship programmes. Build expertise in technology, business, diplomacy, and communication.

Certificate Included Self-Paced Practical Exercises Mentorship Access
Technology

Introduction to Cybersecurity

Learn the fundamentals of cybersecurity including threat analysis, network security, and ethical hacking practices. Ideal for those pursuing a career in IT security.

8 weeks Beginner English
Coming Soon
Technology

AI & Machine Learning Fundamentals

Explore artificial intelligence concepts, supervised and unsupervised learning, neural networks, and real-world applications of machine learning.

10 weeks Intermediate English
Coming Soon
Technology

Data Science Essentials

Master data analysis, visualisation, and statistical methods. Work with Python, SQL, and business intelligence tools to extract meaningful insights from data.

8 weeks Beginner English
Coming Soon
Technology

Digital Marketing Strategy

Learn SEO, social media marketing, content strategy, and paid advertising. Build a complete digital marketing plan from concept to execution.

6 weeks Beginner English
Coming Soon
Business & Finance

International Business Management

Understand global trade dynamics, cross-border regulations, supply chain management, and strategies for expanding businesses internationally.

10 weeks Intermediate English
Coming Soon
Business & Finance

Financial Analysis & Investment

Learn financial modelling, valuation techniques, portfolio management, and how to analyse investment opportunities in global markets.

8 weeks Intermediate English
Coming Soon
Business & Finance

Entrepreneurship Masterclass

From ideation to execution — learn how to build a business plan, secure funding, manage operations, and scale a startup in the European and MENA markets.

12 weeks Advanced English
Coming Soon
Business & Finance

Project Management Professional

Master project planning, Agile and Waterfall methodologies, risk management, and stakeholder communication for successful project delivery.

8 weeks Beginner English
Coming Soon
Diplomacy & Law

International Relations & Diplomacy

Study diplomatic protocols, international organisations, conflict resolution, and the geopolitical landscape of EU–MENA relations.

10 weeks Intermediate English
Coming Soon
Diplomacy & Law

International Business Law

Explore commercial contracts, trade regulations, intellectual property, dispute resolution, and the legal frameworks governing international business.

8 weeks Intermediate English
Coming Soon
Diplomacy & Law

Political Science & Policy Analysis

Analyse political systems, public policy formation, governance structures, and the role of institutions in shaping international cooperation.

8 weeks Advanced English
Coming Soon
Communication

Professional Translation & Interpretation

Develop professional translation skills including legal, business, and technical translation. Learn interpretation techniques for conferences and meetings.

10 weeks Intermediate Multilingual
Coming Soon
Communication

Cross-Cultural Communication

Navigate cultural differences in professional settings. Learn negotiation styles, communication norms, and etiquette across European and Middle Eastern cultures.

6 weeks Beginner English
Coming Soon
Communication

Public Relations & Media Strategy

Build expertise in media relations, crisis communication, brand management, and developing effective PR campaigns for international audiences.

8 weeks Intermediate English
Coming Soon

Important Information

  • Courses are currently under development. Enrolment and pricing will be announced soon.
  • Certificates are issued by CRAVELLE sp. z o.o. and do not represent accredited academic qualifications.
  • Course content, duration, and availability are subject to change without prior notice.
  • These courses are designed to complement our internship programmes but can be taken independently.
